proposed_relations.description: Offset Bus Lanes on First Avenue and Second Avenue from South Ferry to 125th Street, part of the 2010 M15 Select Bus Service implementation

evidence_refs.source_quote: Offset Bus Lane Curbside Bus Lane

The map illustrates the 2010 Implementation Plan for the first avenue/second avenue corridor. It shows the route from South Ferry to 125 St/2 Av. The map includes bus lanes (offset and curbside) and bike lanes (protected, buffered, and curbside).

decisions.rationale: The CB6 presentation explicitly lists offset bus lanes as part of the 2010 Implementation Plan for the First Avenue/Second Avenue Select Bus Service, with the map showing offset bus lanes along both avenues from South Ferry to 125th Street.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Offset Bus Lane Curbside Bus Lane
The map illustrates the 2010 Implementation Plan for the first avenue/second avenue corridor.
